goals.description: Send a direct, non-negotiable text to cohort_3 explicitly demanding the meal be moved or shortened by 45 minutes to guarantee my uninterrupted 2-hour study block until 18:00. I will not accept vague promises about flexibility; I need this boundary set immediately to protect my academic output priority.

Since trust with the group is high (7/10), I can renegotiate without fear of alienation. Failing to set this firm limit now compromises my academic output priority and undermines my reputation for discipline.
